body.title: Gather all dev-process artifacts onto the one canonical substrate devlab/runtime/memory/
body.text:
# D-canonical-substrate-consolidation-2026-06-27
**title:** Gather all dev-process artifacts onto the one canonical substrate devlab/runtime/memory/
**date:** 2026-06-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-substrate-artifact-inventory, T-substrate-artifact-consolidation, T-consequence-canonical-substrate-consolidation

## Decision narrative
The next major thread (deferred on purpose from the 2026-06-27 cleanup): gather ALL dev-process artifacts onto the single canonical substrate devlab/runtime/memory/ so tools and skills operate on the same ground (CLAUDE.md: one home, no exceptions). Shape: an inventory ticket runs the Akien-specified home-wide sweep (artifact keywords x {md,json,txt} under ~/) with an explicit exempt-by-default set (uu_home() runtime state, ~/.claude harness store, credentials, .git, .TheIgors/certs) to produce a worklist; then a gated, HIGH-inertia consolidation ticket migrates+verifies+quarantines (not hard-deletes) each path and re-runs the sweep to prove it clean.

**Conflict with prior decision (audit Check-6):** D-canonical-memory-consolidation-2026-06-23 carries the same 'devlab/runtime/memory/ is the sole home' intention and its consequence ticket is still in sprint = UNVERIFIED. This is filed as a SEPARATE decision, not a re-bet, on a real discriminating axis: 06-23 governed REPO-INTERNAL paths (lab/, devlab/design_docs[_for_igor]/, skill write-paths); THIS decision sweeps HOME-WIDE ~/ for stray artifacts outside the repo. The two consequence tickets must be verified TOGETHER (flagged on T-consequence-canonical-substrate-consolidation). Acknowledged: we are re-betting an as-yet-unverified hypothesis 4 days later — the home-wide axis is the justification, not a fresh claim.

## Hypothesis
After consolidation, a sweep across ~/ for dev-artifact patterns finds NO artifacts outside devlab/runtime/memory/ (minus the exempt-by-default set).

## Measurement Signal
The Akien-specified grep — (slate|ticket|goal|session|project|proof|rule) x (md|json|txt) under ~/, minus the exempt set (uu_home() / ~/.claude / ~/.unseen_university/akien* / .git / .TheIgors/certs / credentials) — returns empty outside devlab/runtime/memory/. Akien's stated acceptance test: 'I can't find any dev artifacts anymore except in devlab/runtime/memory/.'

## Intention
I intend that all dev-process artifacts live on one canonical substrate so tools and skills operate on the same ground (CLAUDE.md: canonical dev-process memory, one home, no exceptions).
